---
title: "DSPP"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Running Code

```{r}
# library(magick)
# library(image.libfacedetection)
# 
# # setwd("C:/path/to/your/WIDER_FACE_folder")
# 
# calculate_detection_rate <- function(folder_path, confidence_threshold = 50, sample_size = 100) {
#   image_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE)
#   image_files <- image_files[!is.na(image_files)]
#   
#   if(length(image_files) == 0) return(0)
#   
#   # Randomly sample up to 100 images to prevent crashing while keeping data robust
#   actual_sample_size <- min(sample_size, length(image_files))
#   sampled_files <- sample(image_files, actual_sample_size)
#   
#   success_count <- 0
#   
#   for (img_path in sampled_files) {
#     img <- tryCatch(image_read(img_path), error = function(e) NULL)
#     
#     if (!is.null(img)) {
#       faces <- image_detect_faces(img)
#       if (length(faces$detections) > 0 && any(faces$detections$confidence >= confidence_threshold)) {
#         success_count <- success_count + 1
#       }
#     }
#   }
#   return((success_count / actual_sample_size) * 100)
# }
```

```{# {r}
# # Compare 3 tiers of Scale
# rate_parade <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/0--Parade/") # Extreme Crowd
# rate_marching <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/10--People_Marching/") # Medium Crowd
# rate_students <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/31--Student_Schoolkids/") # Close-up
# 
# barplot(c(rate_parade, rate_marching, rate_students), 
#         names.arg = c("Parade (Extreme)", "Marching (Medium)", "Students (Close-up)"), 
#         col = c("darkred", "orange", "darkgreen"),
#         main = "Detection Success by Subject Scale", ylab = "Success Rate (%)")
```

```{r}
# # Compare 3 tiers of Occlusion
# rate_riot <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/12--Riot/") # Heavy Occlusion
# rate_racing <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/42--Car_Racing/") # Partial Occlusion (Helmets)
# rate_interview <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/13--Interview/") # Clear
# 
# barplot(c(rate_riot, rate_racing, rate_interview), 
#         names.arg = c("Riot (Heavy)", "Racing (Partial)", "Interview (Clear)"), 
#         col = c("darkred", "orange", "darkgreen"),
#         main = "Detection Success by Occlusion Level", ylab = "Success Rate (%)")
```

```{# {r}
# # Compare 3 tiers of Pose
# rate_gymnastics <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/17--Ceremony/") # Highly Dynamic/Atypical
# rate_cop <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/14--Traffic_Cop/") # Mixed Profiles
# rate_meeting <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/11--Meeting/") # Static/Frontal
# 
# barplot(c(rate_gymnastics, rate_cop, rate_meeting), 
#         names.arg = c("Ceremony (Atypical)", "Traffic Cop (Mixed)", "Meeting (Frontal)"), 
#         col = c("darkred", "orange", "darkgreen"),
#         main = "Detection Success by Pose & Dynamics", ylab = "Success Rate (%)")
```

```{r}
library(magick)
library(image.libfacedetection)

# setwd("C:/path/to/your/WIDER_FACE_folder")

calculate_detection_rate <- function(folder_path = NULL, is_global = FALSE, confidence_threshold = 50, sample_size = 100) {
  
  # If calculating the global baseline, pull from all folders
  if(is_global) {
    image_files <- list.files("WIDER_train/images/", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  } else {
    image_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  }
  
  image_files <- image_files[!is.na(image_files)]
  if(length(image_files) == 0) return(0)
  
  # Randomly sample exactly 100 images to prevent crashing
  actual_sample_size <- min(sample_size, length(image_files))
  sampled_files <- sample(image_files, actual_sample_size)
  
  success_count <- 0
  
  for (img_path in sampled_files) {
    img <- tryCatch(image_read(img_path), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(img)) {
      faces <- image_detect_faces(img)
      if (length(faces$detections) > 0 && any(faces$detections$confidence >= confidence_threshold)) {
        success_count <- success_count + 1
      }
    }
  }
  return((success_count / actual_sample_size) * 100)
}

# EVERYONE CALCULATES THE OVERALL BASELINE
rate_overall_baseline <- calculate_detection_rate(is_global = TRUE)
print(paste("Overall Dataset Baseline:", rate_overall_baseline, "%"))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Scale against the Baseline
rate_parade <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/0--Parade/") # Extreme Crowd
rate_marching <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/10--People_Marching/") # Medium Crowd
rate_students <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/31--Student_Schoolkids/") # Close-up

# Plot including the Overall Baseline
barplot(c(rate_parade, rate_marching, rate_overall_baseline, rate_students), 
        names.arg = c("Parade (Extreme)", "Marching (Medium)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Students (Close-up)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Subject Scale", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Occlusion against the Baseline
rate_riot <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/12--Riot/") # Heavy Occlusion
rate_racing <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/42--Car_Racing/") # Partial Occlusion (Helmets)
rate_interview <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/13--Interview/") # Clear

# Plot including the Overall Baseline
barplot(c(rate_riot, rate_racing, rate_overall_baseline, rate_interview), 
        names.arg = c("Riot (Heavy)", "Racing (Partial)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Interview (Clear)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Occlusion Level", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Pose against the Baseline
rate_gymnastics <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/17--Ceremony/") # Atypical Poses
rate_cop <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/14--Traffic_Cop/") # Mixed Profiles
rate_meeting <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images/11--Meeting/") # Static/Frontal

# Plot including the Overall Baseline
barplot(c(rate_gymnastics, rate_cop, rate_overall_baseline, rate_meeting), 
        names.arg = c("Ceremony (Atypical)", "Traffic Cop (Mixed)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Meeting (Frontal)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Pose", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
folder_path <- "~/Documents/Spring 2026 Courses/DS for Public Policy/face_detection/WIDER_test/images/" 
filenames <- list.files(path = folder_path)
print(filenames)
```

```{r}
list.dirs("WIDER_train/images/", recursive = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(magick)
library(image.libfacedetection)

# setwd("C:/path/to/your/WIDER_FACE_folder")

calculate_detection_rate <- function(folder_path = NULL, is_global = FALSE, confidence_threshold = 50, sample_size = 100) {
  
  if(is_global) {
    # If calculating the global baseline, pull from all folders
    image_files <- list.files("WIDER_train/images/", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  } else {
    # Pull from the specific folder path
    image_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  }
  
  image_files <- image_files[!is.na(image_files)]
  if(length(image_files) == 0) return(0)
  
  # Randomly sample exactly 100 images to prevent crashing
  actual_sample_size <- min(sample_size, length(image_files))
  sampled_files <- sample(image_files, actual_sample_size)
  
  success_count <- 0
  
  for (img_path in sampled_files) {
    img <- tryCatch(image_read(img_path), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(img)) {
      faces <- image_detect_faces(img)
      if (length(faces$detections) > 0 && any(faces$detections$confidence >= confidence_threshold)) {
        success_count <- success_count + 1
      }
    }
  }
  return((success_count / actual_sample_size) * 100)
}

# EVERYONE CALCULATES THE OVERALL BASELINE
rate_overall_baseline <- calculate_detection_rate(is_global = TRUE)
print(paste("Overall Dataset Baseline:", rate_overall_baseline, "%"))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Scale against the Baseline
rate_parade <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//0--Parade") # Extreme Crowd
rate_marching <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//10--People_Marching") # Medium Crowd
rate_students <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//29--Students_Schoolkids") # Close-up

# Plot
barplot(c(rate_parade, rate_marching, rate_overall_baseline, rate_students), 
        names.arg = c("Parade (Extreme)", "Marching (Medium)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Students (Close-up)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Subject Scale", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Occlusion against the Baseline
rate_riot <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//3--Riot") # Heavy Occlusion
rate_racing <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//42--Car_Racing") # Partial Occlusion (Helmets)
rate_interview <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//13--Interview") # Clear

# Plot
barplot(c(rate_riot, rate_racing, rate_overall_baseline, rate_interview), 
        names.arg = c("Riot (Heavy)", "Racing (Partial)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Interview (Clear)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Occlusion Level", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
# Compare 3 tiers of Pose against the Baseline
rate_gymnastics <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//40--Gymnastics") # Highly Atypical Poses
rate_traffic <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//14--Traffic") # Mixed Profiles
rate_meeting <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//11--Meeting") # Static/Frontal

# Plot
barplot(c(rate_gymnastics, rate_traffic, rate_overall_baseline, rate_meeting), 
        names.arg = c("Gymnastics (Atypical)", "Traffic (Mixed)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Meeting (Frontal)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "Detection Success by Pose", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```

```{r}
library(magick)
library(image.libfacedetection)

# UPDATED FUNCTION: Demanding 85% algorithmic confidence
calculate_detection_rate <- function(folder_path = NULL, is_global = FALSE, confidence_threshold = 85, sample_size = 100) {
  
  if(is_global) {
    image_files <- list.files("WIDER_train/images/", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  } else {
    image_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.jpg$|\\.jpeg$")
  }
  
  image_files <- image_files[!is.na(image_files)]
  if(length(image_files) == 0) return(0)
  
  actual_sample_size <- min(sample_size, length(image_files))
  sampled_files <- sample(image_files, actual_sample_size)
  
  success_count <- 0
  
  for (img_path in sampled_files) {
    img <- tryCatch(image_read(img_path), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(img)) {
      faces <- image_detect_faces(img)
      
      # We now demand the AI is 85%+ confident before we count it as a success
      if (length(faces$detections) > 0 && any(faces$detections$confidence >= confidence_threshold)) {
        success_count <- success_count + 1
      }
    }
  }
  return((success_count / actual_sample_size) * 100)
}

# 1. Calculate the overall baseline with the strict 85% rule
rate_overall_baseline <- calculate_detection_rate(is_global = TRUE)
print(paste("Overall Dataset Baseline (High Confidence):", rate_overall_baseline, "%"))

# 2. Re-run your Occlusion variables
rate_riot <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//3--Riot") 
rate_racing <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//42--Car_Racing") 
rate_interview <- calculate_detection_rate("WIDER_train/images//13--Interview") 

# 3. Plot the new, accurate graph
barplot(c(rate_riot, rate_racing, rate_overall_baseline, rate_interview), 
        names.arg = c("Riot (Heavy)", "Racing (Partial)", "OVERALL AVERAGE", "Interview (Clear)"), 
        col = c("darkred", "orange", "gray", "darkgreen"),
        main = "High-Confidence Detection by Occlusion Level", ylab = "Success Rate (%)", ylim=c(0,100))
```
